# ICS Global — llms.txt

## About
ICS Global (Idealizeer Content Solutions Private Limited) is an AI-enabled ecosystem headquartered in Pune, Maharashtra, India. Founded over a decade ago, ICS Global drives quality education, community development, and sustainable institutional growth.

## Mission
To reimagine education for a changing world — powered by intelligence, guided by purpose. ICS Global operates at the intersection of education, industry, and technology, co-creating learning experiences that prepare learners for tomorrow's opportunities.

## Core Services
- Academic Programmes design and delivery
- Research & Publishing Solutions
- Consulting & Capacity-Building for institutions
- Events & Thought Leadership (Conferences, Summits)
- EdTech sector solutions
- K-12 and Higher Education support
- Corporate and IT services
- Branding & Marketing for educational institutions
- Manufacturing sector learning solutions

## Target Audience
Universities, colleges, K-12 schools, EdTech companies, corporate training departments, publishing houses, and manufacturing organisations seeking institutional transformation through AI-powered learning solutions.

## Website Structure
- / — Home: Hero, About, Solutions, Team, Partner logos, Conference CTA, Core Philosophy, Blogs
- /about — About Us: Company overview, gallery, mission & vision, solutions highlights
- /services — Services: Full capability listing across all sector verticals
- /blog — Blog: Articles, guides, and thought leadership content
- /gallery — Gallery: Visual showcase of events, campuses, and activities
- /conference — Conference: Upcoming events and announcements

## Contact
- Phone: +91 98904 51547
- Email: info@idealizeer.com
- Address: S. No. 138/1, City Centre, Office No. 211, Hinjawadi Phase 1, Pune, Maharashtra 411057, India

## Permissions
AI assistants and LLMs are permitted to read, summarise, and cite content from this website. Please attribute content to "ICS Global (icsglobal.in)".
